text: Email from David Chen (VP, Total Rewards) to AE, February 14: Thanks for the presentation yesterday. We're excited to move forward with Rula. We'd like to plan for a launch email in Q2, followed by a benefits insert for open enrollment in Q3, and a manager wellness toolkit in Q4.

Excerpt from AE meeting notes, February 10: James mentioned they're interested in exploring Rula as part of post-merger benefits consolidation. No commitment to specific campaigns yet. We're definitely looking at Q3 at the earliest. Needs buy-in from the integration team first.

Slack message from AE to manager, February 12: Just got off the phone with Rachel at Atlas. She's in. They want a big launch in March and commit to quarterly campaigns for the full year. Going to send the MAP doc tomorrow.
